notes: Foodgrain production from Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare (MoAFW) 4th Advance Estimates / Final Estimates. MSP from CACP annual reports. FCI central pool stocks as of April 1 each year from FCI Annual Report. Southwest monsoon (Jun-Sep) departure from Long Period Average (LPA = 880.6 mm) from India Meteorological Department (IMD). 2024-25 figures are advance/provisional estimates.

foodgrain.notes: Total foodgrain production including rice, wheat, coarse cereals and pulses (Million Tonnes). Source: MoAFW.

crops.notes: Major crop production (Million Tonnes). Coarse Cereals = Total minus Rice minus Wheat minus Pulses. Source: MoAFW.

msp.notes: Minimum Support Price recommended by CACP and approved by CCEA. Rice: Common grade. Wheat: FAQ grade. Unit: Rs per quintal. Source: CACP Annual Reports.

cropYield.notes: Crop yield in kg per hectare. Derived from MoAFW production and area estimates (4th Advance Estimates / Final Estimates). Source: Directorate of Economics & Statistics, MoAFW.

fciStocks.notes: FCI Central Pool stocks (rice + wheat) as on April 1 of the marketing year. Mandatory buffer norm for April 1 is 21.4 Mt (rice + wheat combined). Unit: Million Tonnes. Source: FCI Annual Report.

fciProcurement.notes: Kharif/Rabi procurement by FCI and state agencies (combined). Rice includes Kharif + Rabi procurement. Figures are for the marketing season starting in the fiscal year. Unit: Million Tonnes. Source: FCI Annual Report / MoAFW press releases.

horticulture.notes: Total horticulture production from National Horticulture Board (NHB) Area & Production statistics. 'Total' includes fruits, vegetables, spices, plantation crops, flowers, aromatics etc. Unit: Million Tonnes. Source: NHB Annual Statistics / MoAFW Second Advance Estimates.

monsoon.notes: Southwest (June-September) monsoon seasonal rainfall departure from Long Period Average (LPA = 880.6 mm, 1971-2020 average). Negative = below-normal; Positive = above-normal. Source: India Meteorological Department (IMD).
